title: verbascum × geminatum
intro: Verbascum × geminatum, also known as double-flowered mullein or great mullein, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the verbascum genus, characterized by its large, showy yellow flowers and velvety leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × geminatum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
